column1: Amara Raja Batteries Limited [1] (ARBL) , the flagship company of the Amara Raja Group, is the technology leader and is one of the largest manufacturers of lead-acid batteries for both industrial and automotive applications in the Indian storage battery industry. ARBL has prestigious OEMs as its clients. The Company's Industrial and Automotive batteries are exported to over 50 countries across the globe. In India, Amara Raja is the preferred supplier to major telecom service providers, Telecom equipment manufacturers, UPS sector (OEM & Replacement), Indian Railways and to Power, Oil & Gas among other industry segments. Termination of Shareholders Agreement (tie up) with Johnson Control [2]
